title: Better Crystal
description: Better Crystal is a high-FPS Crystal PvP modpack for Minecraft 1.21, built for smooth and responsive combat.
body:
## Need a server? Use code JELLE25 for 25% off! (Sponsored)
[![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/xILxbJW.png)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3219)

# Better Crystal - High Performance for Crystal PvP

Better Crystal is a simple and fast Crystal PvP modpack made for Minecraft 1.21 with Fabric. It helps you get better FPS, smooth gameplay, and easy crystal fights. Perfect for servers like DonutSMP and other crystal servers. Whether you're fighting close or chasing players, this pack makes you faster and more ready to win.

### Optimized for Crystal PvP:
Includes hand-picked mods that improve render speed, hit registration, and visual clarity.

### High FPS Performance:
Built with lightweight, high-performance mods like Sodium, Entity Culling, and Dynamic FPS to reduce lag, even in crystal-heavy fights.
### 
### DonutSMP-Ready:
Tested and tuned for popular servers like DonutSMP where speed, reaction time, and smooth gameplay make all the difference.

### Minimal Visual Clutter:
UI enhancements like armor HUDs, crosshairs, and tooltip mods give you key information without getting in the way.

### Customizable:
While ready to go out of the box, the modpack allows easy modification to suit your specific PvP needs or server requirements.

![Crystal PvP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/306758043638678e79511bdcbe3992759dcc30a1.jpeg)


## Mods in 1.21 Fabric

- 3D Skin Layers by tr7zw
- AppleSkin by squeek502
- Architectury API by shedaniel
- BetterF3 by TreyRuffy (optional but recommended)
- Chat Heads by masa
- Cloth Config API by shedaniel
- Clumps by Jaredlll08
- Continuity by PepperCode1
- CPVP Essentials (Crystal PvP) by TNYMods
- Default Dark Mode by nebulr
- Dynamic FPS by juliand665
- EMF - Entity Model Features by Sinytra
- Enchant Icons by Link
- Entity Culling by tr7zw
- ETF - Entity Texture Features by Sinytra
- Fabric API by modmuss50
- Fabric Language Kotlin by JetBrains
- Fast IP Ping by Dweebo
- FastQuit by MaxNeedsSnacks
- FerriteCore by malte0811
- ImmediatelyFast by Motschen
- Iris Shaders by coderbot
- ItzRealMe Edit by ItzRealMe
- Just Zoom by EnnuiL
- Konkrete by TeamMidnight
- Low On Fire by Fuzs
- Model Gap Fix by FoundationGames
- Mod Menu by Prospector
- Mouse Tweaks by YaLTeR
- PvP Crosshair by Alix_x_X

- Simple Voice Chat by henkelmax (optional but useful)
- Text Placeholder API by Sinytra
- TotemCounter by Uku
- uku's Armor HUD by Uku
- ukulib by Uku
